<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">load_chapter_map_only</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>

<span class="sd">    Pure read counterpart to :func:`ensure_chapter_map`. Returns ``None`` when</span>

<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">load_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">ensure_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return a chapter map, detecting and persisting it if stale.</span>

<span class="sd">    Unlike :func:`load_chapter_map_only`, this may write</span>
<span class="sd">    ``.booktx/chapter-map.json`` when the cache is missing or records a</span>
<span class="sd">    different source hash. Use it in workflows that need an up-to-date map;</span>
<span class="sd">    use ``load_chapter_map_only`` for read-only status rendering.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project_source_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_map</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">source_sha256</span>
        <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">version</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="n">CURRENT_CHAPTER_MAP_VERSION</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>

        <span class="n">write_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">chapter_map</span>


<div class="viewcode-block" id="detect_chapters">
<a class="viewcode-back" href="../../../api/#booktx.chapters.detect_chapters">[docs]</a>
<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">detect_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Detect chapters and write no files.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">find_source_file</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">project_source_sha256</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">names</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_names</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">protected_terms</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;markdown&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.markdown_io</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">extract_markdown</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">split_front_matter</span>

        <span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">source</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">md_extraction</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">extract_markdown</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">names</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">boundaries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_markdown_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">split_front_matter</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">])</span>
        <span class="n">record_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_project_record_ids</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_build_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">md_extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
            <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">format</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">template</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">manifest</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">try</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">template</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">load_epub_template_from_manifest</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">manifest</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">except</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">template</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">template</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_mapping</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">template</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_mapping</span>
            <span class="n">span_refs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">template</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spans</span>
            <span class="n">navigation_refs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">template</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">navigation</span>
        <span class="k">else</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">epub_extraction</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">extract_epub</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">protected_terms</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">names</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="n">chapter_mapping</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub2text-block-v1&quot;</span>
            <span class="n">span_refs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub_extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_refs</span>
            <span class="n">navigation_refs</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">epub_extraction</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">navigation</span>
        <span class="n">boundaries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_epub_boundaries_from_refs</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">navigation_refs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapter_mapping</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_mapping</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_project_records</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_build_epub_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># pragma: no cover - config validation guards this branch</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_build_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="p">[],</span>
        <span class="p">[],</span>
        <span class="p">[],</span>
        <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">config</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_language</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span></div>



<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_project_record_ids</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span>

    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_span_record_starts</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">starts</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">count</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">starts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">count</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">count</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segment_spans</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">span</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">starts</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_build_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">ProseSpan</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">language</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Markdown chapter map: boundaries index into the prose span list.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[])</span>

    <span class="n">starts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_span_record_starts</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">spans</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">language</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">language</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">starts</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">record_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">starts</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record_start</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">record_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_assemble_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_assemble_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]],</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Turn ``(record_position, title)`` candidates into contiguous chapters.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[])</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">candidates</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)]</span>
    <span class="k">elif</span> <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">insert</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Front matter&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">deduped</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]:</span>
                <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">)</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">))</span>

    <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Chapter</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">next_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">idx</span><span class="p">][</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">idx</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">next_start</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">end</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_records</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">start</span> <span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">end</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_unique_chunk_ids</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_records</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">Chapter</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="o">+</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="si">:</span><span class="s2">04d</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">title</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chunk_ids</span><span class="p">,</span>
                <span class="n">start_record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_records</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">],</span>
                <span class="n">end_record_id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapter_records</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">],</span>
                <span class="n">record_count</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_records</span><span class="p">),</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">chapters</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_project_records</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">project</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">Project</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Ordered ``Record`` objects across all chunks (canonical chunk order).&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.models</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span>

    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">chunk_path</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">project</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chunks</span><span class="p">():</span>
        <span class="n">chunk</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">Chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">model_validate_json</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_path</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">read_text</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;utf-8&quot;</span><span class="p">))</span>
        <span class="n">records</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">records</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_record_positions_by_span</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Map each ``Record.span_index`` to its first position in the record array.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">positions</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">dict</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{}</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">position</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">enumerate</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">positions</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">setdefault</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">position</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">positions</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_build_epub_chapter_map</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">Record</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Build a chapter map by resolving EPUB boundaries through canonical records.</span>

<span class="sd">    Each EPUB boundary carries an ``EpubSpanRef.span_index`` (a prose-span</span>
<span class="sd">    index). It is resolved to a record-array position via ``Record.span_index``.</span>
<span class="sd">    A boundary whose span_index has no matching record is a manifest/extraction</span>
<span class="sd">    inconsistency and raises instead of silently defaulting to record zero.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">record_ids</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">record</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">records</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">ChapterMap</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">chapters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[])</span>
    <span class="n">positions_by_span</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_record_positions_by_span</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">records</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">tuple</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">position</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">positions_by_span</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">get</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">position</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">raise</span> <span class="ne">ValueError</span><span class="p">(</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;EPUB chapter boundary at span_index=&quot;</span>
                <span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2"> (title=</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="si">!r}</span><span class="s2">) has no &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;matching extracted record; the source manifest is inconsistent &quot;</span>
                <span class="s2">&quot;with the extracted chunks. Re-run `booktx extract`.&quot;</span>
            <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">candidates</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">((</span><span class="n">position</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_assemble_chapters</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">candidates</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">source_sha256</span><span class="p">)</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_unique_chunk_ids</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="n">out</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">record_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">record_ids</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">record_id</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">split</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;-&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chunk_id</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">seen</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">seen</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">add</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">out</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chunk_id</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">out</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_markdown_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">body</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">tokens</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">MarkdownIt</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;commonmark&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;html&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">})</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">enable</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;table&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">parse</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">body</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">str</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">inline_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span>
    <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">token</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">tokens</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">ttype</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">type</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ttype</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;_open&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">ttype</span><span class="p">[:</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;_open&quot;</span><span class="p">)])</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ttype</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">endswith</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;_close&quot;</span><span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">pop</span><span class="p">()</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ttype</span> <span class="o">!=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;inline&quot;</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">parent</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">open_blocks</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">open_blocks</span> <span class="k">else</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">parent</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_TRANSLATABLE_MARKDOWN_PARENTS</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="n">inline_index</span> <span class="o">+=</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">parent</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;heading&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">inline_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">token</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">content</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">boundaries</span>


<span class="n">_TRANSLATABLE_MARKDOWN_PARENTS</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">TRANSLATABLE_INLINE_PARENTS</span>

<span class="n">_HEADING_TAGS</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span><span class="s2">&quot;h1&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;h2&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;h3&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;h4&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;h5&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">&quot;h6&quot;</span><span class="p">}</span>


<span class="n">_prose_span_from_ref</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">prose_span_from_epub_ref</span>  <span class="c1"># backward-compatible alias</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_heading_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Heading-tag boundaries keyed by ``EpubSpanRef.span_index``.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_text</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">span_refs</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tag_name</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">_HEADING_TAGS</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_text</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">()</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_annotated_chapter_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Authoritative boundaries from upstream ``chapter_id``/``chapter_title``.</span>

<span class="sd">    Emits one boundary per chapter transition, keyed by the first span_index</span>
<span class="sd">    carrying a new ``chapter_id``. An all-None annotation set returns ``[]``, a</span>
<span class="sd">    distinct authoritative &quot;no assignment&quot; result: callers must not fall back</span>
<span class="sd">    to legacy navigation when ``chapter_mapping`` is v1.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="n">last_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">last_chapter_id</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_title</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">())</span>
        <span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">last_chapter_id</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">chapter_id</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">boundaries</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_epub_boundaries_from_refs</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">navigation_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="o">*</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">chapter_mapping</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">str</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;legacy&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_heading_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">chapter_mapping</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;epub2text-block-v1&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Authoritative upstream block annotations. Use them even when empty;</span>
        <span class="c1"># never fall back to legacy navigation for a v1 manifest.</span>
        <span class="n">primary</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_annotated_chapter_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">primary</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">_looks_like_partial_numbered_chapter_sequence</span><span class="p">(</span>
            <span class="n">primary</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span>
        <span class="p">):</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_merge_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">primary</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="n">toc_extra</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_toc_document_start_extras</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">primary</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">toc_extra</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_merge_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">primary</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">toc_extra</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">primary</span>
    <span class="c1"># Legacy manifests: conservative navigation-derived detection.</span>
    <span class="n">nav_boundaries</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_navigation_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">navigation_refs</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">_looks_like_partial_numbered_chapter_sequence</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span>
    <span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_merge_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Last resort: TOC-derived document starts for extracted documents whose</span>
    <span class="c1"># chapter-like titles are not yet covered by navigation or headings. Targets</span>
    <span class="c1"># without extracted spans are never used, so this cannot create empty</span>
    <span class="c1"># chapters for missing/truncated documents.</span>
    <span class="n">toc_extra</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_toc_document_start_extras</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">toc_extra</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">_merge_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">toc_extra</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">nav_boundaries</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_boundary_ordinals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">set</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="nb">int</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_toc_audit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">chapter_ordinal</span>

    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="p">{</span>
        <span class="n">ordinal</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">ordinal</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">chapter_ordinal</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">b</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">b</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ordinal</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="p">}</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_looks_like_partial_numbered_chapter_sequence</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">bool</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;True when navigation is a strict subset of a chapter-like heading sequence.</span>

<span class="sd">    Navigation must already cover at least one numbered chapter, headings must</span>
<span class="sd">    contain at least one numbered chapter not present in navigation, and every</span>
<span class="sd">    navigation ordinal must be backed by a heading. This keeps h2 section</span>
<span class="sd">    headings, front-matter, and non-numbered titles from triggering a merge.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">nav_ordinals</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_boundary_ordinals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">heading_ordinals</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_boundary_ordinals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">heading_boundaries</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">nav_ordinals</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">heading_ordinals</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">False</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">nav_ordinals</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="n">heading_ordinals</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_merge_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">*</span><span class="n">groups</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">])</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Combine boundary groups, sorted by span_index with deduplication.</span>

<span class="sd">    Two boundaries landing on the same span_index collapse into one; a titled</span>
<span class="sd">    boundary wins over an untitled one at the same position.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="n">combined</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">group</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">groups</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">combined</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">extend</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">group</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">combined</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">boundary</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">combined</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">deduped</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">boundary</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">:</span>
                <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="o">-</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">boundary</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">deduped</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">boundary</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">deduped</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_toc_document_start_extras</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">],</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Return TOC-derived boundaries for uncovered extracted chapter documents.&quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">booktx.epub_toc_audit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">chapter_ordinal</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="n">toc_document_start_boundaries</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>

    <span class="n">covered</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_boundary_ordinals</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">nav_boundaries</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="n">_boundary_ordinals</span><span class="p">(</span>
        <span class="n">heading_boundaries</span>
    <span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">extras</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">toc_document_start_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">):</span>
        <span class="n">ordinal</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">chapter_ordinal</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">ordinal</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">ordinal</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">covered</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">extras</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">title</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">extras</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_navigation_boundaries</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">navigation_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]:</span>
    <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">entry</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="nb">sorted</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">navigation_refs</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">order</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">item</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">level</span><span class="p">)):</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">strip</span><span class="p">():</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">span_index</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">_navigation_span_index</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">)</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span_index</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">continue</span>
        <span class="n">boundaries</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">_Boundary</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">title</span><span class="p">))</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">boundaries</span>


<span class="k">def</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nf">_navigation_span_index</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">entry</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">EpubNavigationRef</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">span_refs</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="nb">list</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">EpubSpanRef</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">-&gt;</span> <span class="nb">int</span> <span class="o">|</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
<span class="w">    </span><span class="sd">&quot;&quot;&quot;Conservatively map a legacy navigation entry to an ``EpubSpanRef.span_index``.</span>

<span class="sd">    Legacy manifests predate upstream block annotations, so this re-derives the</span>
<span class="sd">    mapping from stored navigation metadata. It is intentionally conservative</span>
<span class="sd">    and returns ``None`` (no boundary) rather than guessing:</span>

<span class="sd">    - fallback navigation entries (``source == &quot;fallback&quot;``) are ignored;</span>
<span class="sd">    - unresolved fragments (``fragment is not None`` with no resolvable offset)</span>
<span class="sd">      are ignored — only a whole-document href maps to document start;</span>
<span class="sd">    - a whole-document href maps to document start only when its document href</span>
<span class="sd">      and spine index are both known (matches upstream ``_effective_start``);</span>
<span class="sd">    - an offset at or beyond all matching spans is ignored;</span>
<span class="sd">    - the returned value is the stored ``EpubSpanRef.span_index``, never a</span>
<span class="sd">      position inside the ``span_refs`` list.</span>

<span class="sd">    Legacy parity with upstream block ranges is not exact; re-extraction is the</span>
<span class="sd">    authoritative fix for an old project.</span>
<span class="sd">    &quot;&quot;&quot;</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;fallback&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="c1"># Unresolved fragment: never map (mirrors upstream _effective_start).</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fragment</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_char_start</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">matches</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
        <span class="n">span_ref</span>
        <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">span_refs</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span>
    <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">matches</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine_index</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">matches</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
            <span class="n">span_ref</span>
            <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">span_refs</span>
            <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine_index</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine_index</span>
        <span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="n">matches</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
    <span class="n">matches</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">key</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="k">lambda</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_char_start</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="c1"># Whole-document href: require a known document and spine.</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">document_href</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">or</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">spine_index</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="kc">None</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
        <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">matches</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">matches</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_char_start</span>
        <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="ow">is</span> <span class="ow">not</span> <span class="kc">None</span> <span class="ow">and</span> <span class="n">start</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">entry</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">source_char_start</span><span class="p">:</span>
            <span class="k">return</span> <span class="n">span_ref</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">span_index</span>
    <span class="c1"># Offset beyond all matching spans: no boundary.</span>
    <span class="k">return</span> <span class="kc">None</span>
</pre></div>
